shells.name: Destroyer
shells.description: A frontline combat shell built for sustained engagements. The Destroyer charges into battle with Thrusters and Tactical Sprint, locks down zones with the Riot Barricade, and finishes targets with heat-seeking Search & Destroy missiles.
shells.primeAbilityDesc: Activate a heat-seeking missile pod that fires homing missiles at nearby hostiles. Missiles auto-target enemies in line of sight and deal explosive damage on impact.
shells.tactAbilityDesc: Deploy a front-facing energy shield that blocks incoming projectile and energy damage. The barricade has its own energy pool that drains over time and when absorbing hits.
shells.trait1Desc: Perform a lateral dash to quickly evade incoming fire or reposition in combat. Generates heat on use.
shells.trait2Desc: Sprint at increased speed with enhanced momentum. Generates additional heat while active.

shells.name: Assassin
shells.description: A stealth-oriented shell that uses invisibility and smoke to evade detection and dominate engagements. The Assassin excels at flanking, ambushes, and disrupting enemy backlines before vanishing without a trace.
shells.primeAbilityDesc: Launch a disc that deploys vision-impairing smoke clouds on impact. The smoke obscures line of sight and provides cover for repositioning.
shells.tactAbilityDesc: Activate temporary invisibility. Visibility increases with movement speed, and firing a weapon or taking damage breaks the cloak immediately.
shells.trait1Desc: Negate fall damage and deploy a smokescreen on landing. Enables aggressive vertical plays and safe retreats from height.
shells.trait2Desc: Become invisible when entering smoke clouds. Allows seamless transitions between smoke cover and cloaked movement.

shells.name: Recon
shells.description: An intelligence-gathering shell focused on tracking enemies and providing intel to the squad. The Recon punishes passive play with its tracking mechanics and reveals threats before direct contact.
shells.primeAbilityDesc: Emit a sonar pulse that reveals nearby enemy positions, including invisible Runners. Detected enemies are highlighted through walls for a short duration.
shells.tactAbilityDesc: Deploy a spider-like drone that chases a targeted enemy. On contact, the drone detonates and forces the target into a severely overheated state, restricting their movement.
shells.trait1Desc: Receive an alert when you are pinged by enemy abilities. Eliminating a hostile automatically pings their nearby teammates.
shells.trait2Desc: Enemies leave a lingering holographic footprint trail for a short time after their shields are destroyed, allowing you to track their retreat.

shells.name: Vandal
shells.description: A high-mobility shell built for aggressive players who rely on mechanical skill and movement tech. Equipped with microjets for double jumps and an extended power slide, the Vandal creates chaos through rapid repositioning and displacement.
shells.primeAbilityDesc: Activate a temporary movement speed boost with improved weapon handling. Allows aggressive pushes by chaining double jumps and power slides without instantly overheating.
shells.tactAbilityDesc: Fire a chargeable energy projectile from an arm cannon that causes massive knockback on impact, displacing enemies and creating space.
shells.trait1Desc: Perform a double jump using micro-thrusters. Each jump generates heat that must be managed to avoid overheating.
shells.trait2Desc: Execute an extended slide that travels further and faster than other shells. Generates heat proportional to distance covered.

shells.name: Thief
shells.description: The loot acquisition specialist of Marathon. The Thief excels at locating and extracting valuable gear with a manually controlled Pickpocket Drone, a versatile Grapple Device, and enhanced loot-detection capabilities.
shells.primeAbilityDesc: Deploy and manually control a flying drone that whips enemy players and UESC drones to knock loot from their packs. The drone can retrieve dropped items and return them to you.
shells.tactAbilityDesc: Fire a grapple dart and reel yourself toward the impact point. Enables rapid traversal, climbing, and swinging around the environment.
shells.trait1Desc: Activate a visor that highlights hostiles and containers color-coded by their most valuable item. Containers are revealed through walls; aiming at hostiles hacks their optics.
shells.trait2Desc: Gain increased weapon handling and accelerated Grapple Device recharge based on the number of items in your backpack.

shells.name: Triage
shells.description: Marathon's primary medic shell, focused on keeping allies alive and fighting. Triage can revive downed teammates at range, deploy healing drones, and share consumable benefits across the squad.
shells.primeAbilityDesc: Ready a defibrillator device. Lock on to downed crew members to revive them at range, or target hostile Runners to deliver an EMP shock that disrupts their systems.
shells.tactAbilityDesc: Deploy a floating drone that attaches to crew members, restoring health and shields over time and preventing them from bleeding out when downed.
shells.trait1Desc: Boost weapon performance at the cost of generating additional heat. While active, breaking an enemy's shield with a volt weapon EMPs them.
shells.trait2Desc: Benefits from medical consumables are shared between crew members with Med-Drone attached to them.

shells.name: Rook
shells.description: A stripped-down scavenger frame for zero-risk solo play. Rook drops into raids already in progress with no loadout, losing nothing on death. Ideal for learning maps, practicing loot routes, or recovering items from a failed run.
shells.primeAbilityDesc: Blend in with UESC forces, making AI enemies treat you as friendly. Allows safe passage through hostile zones to scavenge gear undisturbed.
shells.tactAbilityDesc: Highlight nearby lootable containers and dropped items through walls for a short duration. Helps locate valuable gear quickly in unfamiliar territory.
shells.trait1Desc: Enter raids with a basic starting kit. You bring nothing in and lose nothing on elimination, making every run pure profit.
shells.trait2Desc: Join matches already in progress as a solo player. Spawn in secondary zones with lower enemy density.

weapons.name: M77 Assault Rifle
weapons.description: Ballistic assault rifle with a built-in scope for high precision.

weapons.name: Overrun AR
weapons.description: Light assault rifle with high rate of fire. Excels at close-to-mid range engagements.

weapons.name: Impact HAR
weapons.description: Heavy assault rifle with high impact per round. Slower fire rate compensated by devastating damage.

weapons.name: V75 Scar
weapons.description: Volt-powered assault rifle that trades kinetic punch for consistent energy damage and shield disruption.

weapons.name: BRRT SMG
weapons.description: Compact submachine gun with a five-round burst firing mechanism. Devastating at close range.

weapons.name: Bully SMG
weapons.description: Heavy ballistic submachine gun with a brutal reputation. Reliable stopping power in CQB.

weapons.name: Copperhead RF
weapons.description: Rapid-fire submachine gun optimized for hip-fire accuracy. Built for run-and-gun playstyles.

weapons.name: V22 Volt Thrower
weapons.description: Volt-powered SMG that excels at stripping enemy shields. Energy rounds cause brief disruption on hit.

weapons.name: Hardline PR
weapons.description: Single-round semiautomatic precision rifle with high rate of fire. Rewards accurate shooters.

weapons.name: Repeater HPR
weapons.description: Lever-action heavy precision rifle. Reloads one round at a time for sustained engagements.

weapons.name: Stryder M1T
weapons.description: Fine-tuned semiautomatic precision rifle. Exceptional range and accuracy for marksman play.

weapons.name: Twin Tap HBR
weapons.description: Burst-fire heavy ballistic precision rifle with dual-round delivery system.

weapons.name: BR33 Volley Rifle
weapons.description: Three-round burst precision rifle. Consistent damage output at medium range.

weapons.name: V66 Lookout
weapons.description: Volt precision rifle that requires a brief charge before firing. High reward for patient aim.

weapons.name: V95 Lookout
weapons.description: Advanced volt precision rifle with higher damage and longer charge time than its predecessor.

weapons.name: Longshot
weapons.description: Ballistic bolt-action sniper rifle. High damage, high customization potential.

weapons.name: Outland
weapons.description: Heavy-caliber sniper rifle built for extreme range. Devastating body shots and one-shot headshot potential.

weapons.name: V99 Channel Rifle
weapons.description: Volt-powered sniper rifle that channels energy into a devastating focused beam. Requires charging before each shot.

weapons.name: WSTR Combat Shotgun
weapons.description: Ballistic double-barrel shotgun. Packs high damage in close quarters.

weapons.name: Misriah 2442
weapons.description: Pump-action combat shotgun with a larger magazine. Reliable room-clearing capability.

weapons.name: V85 Circuit Breaker
weapons.description: Volt-powered shotgun that delivers concentrated energy blasts. Excels at stripping shields at close range.

weapons.name: Conquest LMG
weapons.description: Light machine gun with ramping rate of fire. Enhanced stability while crouched.

weapons.name: Demolition HMG
weapons.description: Heavy machine gun built for sustained suppressive fire. Massive magazine at the cost of mobility.

weapons.name: Retaliator LMG
weapons.description: Belt-fed light machine gun with high rate of fire. Extended magazine for prolonged engagements.

weapons.name: CE Tactical Sidearm
weapons.description: Light ballistic pistol with standard semiautomatic fire. Reliable backup weapon.

weapons.name: Magnum MC
weapons.description: Heavy pistol equipped with modular muzzle and optics rail. Packs a serious punch.

weapons.name: V11 Punch
weapons.description: Volt-actuated pistol. Tap for semiautomatic fire or hold to build and release a high-damage burst.

weapons.name: Ares RG
weapons.description: Volt-powered railgun that fires magnetically accelerated rounds. Requires brief charge-up between shots.

weapons.name: V00 Zeus RG
weapons.description: Anti-materiel railgun. Fires automatically once fully charged. Devastating against armored targets and vehicles.

weapons.name: Runner Knife
weapons.description: Standard-issue utility knife carried by all Runners. Last resort or stealth option.

weaponMods.name: Quickfire Barrel
weaponMods.description: Shortened barrel that increases fire rate at the cost of added recoil.

weaponMods.name: Farshot Barrel
weaponMods.description: Extended barrel optimized for long-range engagements. Slightly reduces handling.

weaponMods.name: Precision Barrel
weaponMods.description: Precision-machined barrel that tightens projectile spread and extends effective range.

weaponMods.name: Steady Barrel
weaponMods.description: Weighted barrel that dramatically reduces recoil. Slightly lowers fire rate.

weaponMods.name: Ironhold Barrel
weaponMods.description: Reinforced barrel designed for sustained automatic fire. Reduces weapon sway.

weaponMods.name: Nano-Suppressor
weaponMods.description: Compact suppressor that masks muzzle flash and reduces recoil. Slight range penalty.

weaponMods.name: Tru-shot Barrel
weaponMods.description: Competition-grade barrel with micro-rifling for enhanced projectile accuracy.

weaponMods.name: Overcharge Lens
weaponMods.description: Amplifies volt weapon output at the cost of increased recoil. Prestige-grade modification.

weaponMods.name: Suppression Muzzle
weaponMods.description: Advanced sound suppression system that virtually eliminates muzzle signature.

weaponMods.name: Hi-cap Mag
weaponMods.description: Extended magazine that holds additional rounds. Slightly increases reload time.

weaponMods.name: Drum Mag
weaponMods.description: High-capacity drum magazine. Significant reload time penalty and reduced handling.

weaponMods.name: Feather Mag
weaponMods.description: Lightweight magazine that speeds up reloads at the cost of capacity.

weaponMods.name: Reloader Mag
weaponMods.description: Spring-assisted magazine that significantly reduces reload time.

weaponMods.name: Steady Rounds
weaponMods.description: Precision-manufactured rounds with tighter tolerances. Improves stability and range.

weaponMods.name: Hollow-Case Rounds
weaponMods.description: Expanding rounds that deal more damage at close range but lose velocity faster.

weaponMods.name: Combat Mag
weaponMods.description: Military-spec magazine with improved spring and follower design.

weaponMods.name: Tapered Heatsink
weaponMods.description: Integrated cooling fins that reduce heat buildup during sustained fire.

weaponMods.name: Overclocked Delimiter
weaponMods.description: Removes fire rate limiters for maximum output. Burns through ammo faster.

weaponMods.name: Midsight Optic
weaponMods.description: Mid-range holographic sight. Clean reticle with minimal visual obstruction.

weaponMods.name: Rangefinder Optic
weaponMods.description: Long-range scope with built-in rangefinder. Displays distance to target.

weaponMods.name: Thermal Optic
weaponMods.description: Thermal imaging scope that highlights heat signatures. Improves target acquisition.

weaponMods.name: Oracle Lens
weaponMods.description: AI-assisted optic that provides predictive aim assistance and threat highlighting.

weaponMods.name: Vital Intel
weaponMods.description: Advanced targeting optic that highlights critical hit zones on scoped targets.

weaponMods.name: Neuro Optic Lens
weaponMods.description: Neural-linked optic that subtly adjusts aim based on eye tracking data.

weaponMods.name: Combat Grip
weaponMods.description: Ergonomic grip that improves weapon handling and reduces felt recoil.

weaponMods.name: Snapshot Grip
weaponMods.description: Quick-draw grip that dramatically improves ADS speed. Slight stability penalty.

weaponMods.name: Sturdy Brace Grip
weaponMods.description: Heavy-duty grip brace that stabilizes the weapon during sustained fire.

weaponMods.name: Vigilant Grip
weaponMods.description: Tactical grip with integrated pressure sensor for improved shot placement.

weaponMods.name: Speed Scout Grip
weaponMods.description: Lightweight grip that improves weapon swap speed and movement while ADS.

weaponMods.name: Ornithologist
weaponMods.description: Scanning chip that highlights nearby loot containers and valuable items.

weaponMods.name: Heatsink
weaponMods.description: Thermal management chip that reduces overall heat generation from weapons.

weaponMods.name: Battle Runner
weaponMods.description: Movement optimization chip that increases sprint speed after weapon kills.

weaponMods.name: Torch Bug
weaponMods.description: Overclocking chip that boosts weapon damage output at the cost of heat.

weaponMods.name: Insurrection
weaponMods.description: Combat chip that increases damage against UESC targets. Adds slight recoil.

weaponMods.name: Keen Scout Chip
weaponMods.description: Enhanced detection chip that extends ping duration on tracked targets.

weaponMods.name: Afterburner
weaponMods.description: Performance chip that removes fire rate limiters. Significantly increases heat output.

weaponMods.name: Flash Draw Chip
weaponMods.description: Quick-swap chip that drastically reduces weapon ready time after switching.

weaponMods.name: Bounty Hunter
weaponMods.description: Targeting chip that provides bonus damage on precision hits against marked targets.

weaponMods.name: Balanced Shield
weaponMods.description: Shield mod that balances shield capacity and regeneration rate.

weaponMods.name: Control Shield
weaponMods.description: Reinforced shield that provides extra protection at the cost of movement speed.

weaponMods.name: Turbo Generator
weaponMods.description: Overclocked shield generator that rapidly regenerates at the cost of max capacity.

cores.name: Bombardier
cores.abilityModification: Search and Destroy duration extends on hostile defeats.

cores.name: Bombing Run
cores.abilityModification: Successive homing missiles deal increased damage.

cores.name: Heavy Ordnance
cores.abilityModification: Explosive defeats reduce Search and Destroy cooldown.

cores.name: Bullrush
cores.abilityModification: Riot Barricade avoids passive energy drain during sprints. Incoming barricade damage returns as shield energy.

cores.name: Impact Siphons
cores.abilityModification: Incoming damage dealt to your Riot Barricade is returned to you as shield energy.

cores.name: Counter Attack
cores.abilityModification: Riot Barricade damage triggers retaliatory missiles at attackers.

cores.name: Ankle Breaker
cores.abilityModification: Thruster generates reduced heat near hostiles.

cores.name: Intake Vents
cores.abilityModification: Tactical Sprint generates less heat.

cores.name: Myrmidon
cores.abilityModification: After using your Thruster, your melee damage is temporarily increased.

cores.name: Ghost Protocol
cores.abilityModification: Smoke fields persist longer before dissipating.

cores.name: Flexweave Casing
cores.abilityModification: Faster movement and weapon readiness while invisible.

cores.name: Patience
cores.abilityModification: Invisibility timer pauses while stationary at the cost of generating heat.

cores.name: Guerrilla
cores.abilityModification: Active Camo and Shadow Dive recharge faster while in smoke.

cores.name: Breathing Space
cores.abilityModification: Shroud increases weapon reload speed in smoke fields.

cores.name: Safe Landings
cores.abilityModification: Shadow Dive creates knockback and extended smoke coverage on landing.

cores.name: Shadow Strike
cores.abilityModification: Utility knife deals significantly increased damage from invisibility.

cores.name: Minus Sights
cores.abilityModification: After aiming down sights for a short time, you become invisible at the cost of generating heat.

cores.name: Hot Pursuit
cores.abilityModification: Tracker Drone travels faster with extended detonation range.

cores.name: Cluster Payload
cores.abilityModification: Stalker Protocol trail lasts longer. Heat reduction on kills while trail is active.

cores.name: On the Trail
cores.abilityModification: Enhanced Stalker Protocol effects and heat reduction benefits on tracked targets.

cores.name: Intuition
cores.abilityModification: Interrogation now triggers upon downing a hostile Runner instead of requiring a finisher.

cores.name: Early Warning System
cores.abilityModification: HUD alert when hostile Runners approach within a set radius.

cores.name: Adrenal Core
cores.abilityModification: Movement abilities generate less heat while Amplified.

cores.name: Cut To The Chase
cores.abilityModification: Disruptor Cannon overcharge time reduced. Faster charge for quicker displacement.

cores.name: Tag!
cores.abilityModification: Disruptor Cannon deals additional damage and pings targets caught in the blast.

cores.name: Mechanized Holsters
cores.abilityModification: Power Slide reloads ballistic weapons from reserves and recharges volt weapon batteries.

cores.name: Microjet Efficiency Package
cores.abilityModification: Gain an additional charge for your Microjets that generates less heat. Enables triple jump.

cores.name: Lock 'N Load
cores.abilityModification: Weapons ready and reload more quickly. Receive less flinch from incoming fire.

cores.name: Partner in Crime
cores.abilityModification: Pickpocket Drone periodically releases a pulse that pings nearby hostiles when not being piloted.

cores.name: Hit and Run
cores.abilityModification: Melee after grapple hacks targets and knocks random loot from their backpack.

cores.name: Case the Joint
cores.abilityModification: X-Ray Visor gains expanded vision range through walls.

cores.name: Keen Eye
cores.abilityModification: Hacking a hostile with your X-Ray Visor extends its duration.

cores.name: Greed is Good
cores.abilityModification: When your backpack is full, sprint speed and slide distance increase.

cores.name: Premium Package
cores.abilityModification: Pickpocket Drone gains increased durability and lifespan.

cores.name: Hideout
cores.abilityModification: Piloting the Pickpocket Drone grants invisibility to your Runner body.

cores.name: High Voltage
cores.abilityModification: EMP defeats reduce Battery Overcharge cooldown.

cores.name: Electron Recapture Sinks
cores.abilityModification: Volt weapon defeats restore charge during Battery Overcharge.

cores.name: Hypocratic Oath
cores.abilityModification: Damaging a hostile with Reboot+ reduces the cooldown of your next Reboot+.

cores.name: No Good Deed
cores.abilityModification: Receive a burst of healing when your Med-Drone attaches to a crew member.

cores.name: Samaritan
cores.abilityModification: Consumable sharing reduces Med-Drone cooldown.

cores.name: Trophy Hunter
cores.abilityModification: Defeating UESC commanders grants Tactical and Prime ability energy.

cores.name: Cash Flow
cores.abilityModification: Opening unlooted containers pings nearby data cards for easy collection.

cores.name: Bad Cop
cores.abilityModification: Finishers grant Tactical and Prime ability energy.

cores.name: Communal Cleanse
cores.abilityModification: Consumables remove negative effects from nearby crew members.

cores.name: Loot Tracker
cores.abilityModification: Pings nearby loot containers after using a Prime or Tactical ability.

implants.name: Regen V1
implants.description: Basic neural implant that improves natural health regeneration.

implants.name: Regen V2
implants.description: Improved neural implant with enhanced regeneration circuits.
implants.perk: Overclocked Cooling: While under the benefits of a Mechanic's Kit or OS Debug, gain increased Heat Capacity.

implants.name: Regen V3
implants.description: Advanced regeneration implant with nano-repair systems.
implants.perk: Overclocked Cooling: While under the benefits of a Mechanic's Kit or OS Debug, gain increased Heat Capacity.

implants.name: Regen V4
implants.description: Elite-grade regeneration implant with rapid nano-repair.
implants.perk: Overclocked Cooling: While under the benefits of a Mechanic's Kit or OS Debug, gain increased Heat Capacity.

implants.name: Ping+ V1
implants.description: Basic detection implant that extends ping visibility duration.

implants.name: Ping+ V2
implants.description: Enhanced detection circuits with improved signal processing.
implants.perk: Never There: Reduces the duration you remain pinged by enemy abilities.

implants.name: Ping+ V3
implants.description: Advanced ping implant with extended detection range.
implants.perk: Bedside Manner: Med-Drone pings hostile Runners near attached crew members.

implants.name: Ping+ V4
implants.description: Elite ping implant with maximum signal clarity and range.
implants.perk: Never There: Reduces the duration you remain pinged by enemy abilities.

implants.name: Energy Harvesting V1
implants.description: Scavenging implant that converts ambient energy into ability charge.

implants.name: Energy Harvesting V2
implants.description: Improved energy harvesting with emergency detection.
implants.perk: Emergency Intel: Taking damage from enemy equipment automatically pings the attacker.

implants.name: Energy Harvesting V3
implants.description: Advanced energy harvesting system with clean slate protocols.
implants.perk: Clean Slate: Ability energy is refunded when you revive from a downed state.

implants.name: Augmented Capacitors V2
implants.description: Neural capacitor implant that increases heat tolerance.
implants.perk: Neural Stabilizer: Reduced screen shake and aim disruption from heat buildup.

implants.name: Augmented Capacitors V3
implants.description: Advanced capacitor system with emergency heat dumping.
implants.perk: Ordnance Report: Defeating enemies with explosives generates a ping at the kill location.

implants.name: Sprint Kit V2
implants.description: Neural sprint optimizer that enhances movement speed processing.
implants.perk: Tox Injectors: Sprinting temporarily increases resistance to damage-over-time effects.

implants.name: Thick Skull V1
implants.description: Reinforced cranial plating that improves damage resistance.

implants.name: Thick Skull V2
implants.description: Enhanced cranial reinforcement with counterhack capability.
implants.perk: Last Train Out: Briefly gain damage resistance when your shields break.

implants.name: Helping Hands V1
implants.description: Support-oriented torso implant that speeds up crew revival.

implants.name: Helping Hands V2
implants.description: Enhanced revival systems with haptic feedback integration.
implants.perk: Haptic Feedback: Reviving crew members briefly increases your weapon handling.

implants.name: Helping Hands V3
implants.description: Advanced revival implant with crew health monitoring.
implants.perk: Sympathetic Reflex: Increased ADS speed and weapon handling when nearby crew members are revived.

implants.name: Hurting Hands V2
implants.description: Combat torso implant that enhances melee strike power.
implants.perk: Haptic Feedback: Melee kills briefly increase weapon handling speed.

implants.name: Hurting Hands V3
implants.description: Advanced melee enhancer with sympathetic reflex integration.
implants.perk: Sympathetic Reflex: Defeating hostiles grants increased ADS speed to you and nearby crew.

implants.name: Knife Fight V1
implants.description: CQB-optimized implant that improves knife handling and close combat.

implants.name: Knife Fight V2
implants.description: Enhanced CQB system with crowd control capability.
implants.perk: Crowd Control: Melee kills increase movement speed for a short duration.

implants.name: Knife Fight V3
implants.description: Advanced CQB implant with intel extraction on takedown.
implants.perk: Stolen Intel: Melee kills ping nearby enemies for a short duration.

implants.name: Nimble Fingers V1
implants.description: Dexterity implant that speeds up looting and weapon handling.

implants.name: Nimble Fingers V2
implants.description: Enhanced dexterity system with sympathetic response.
implants.perk: Sympathetic Reflex: Increased ADS speed and weapon handling after defeating hostiles.

implants.name: Nimble Fingers V3
implants.description: Advanced dexterity implant for elite loot extraction.
implants.perk: Run Ya Pockets: Looting is faster and reveals nearby additional loot containers.

implants.name: Survival Kit V1
implants.description: General-purpose survival implant that improves damage resistance.

implants.name: Survival Kit V2
implants.description: Enhanced survival system with snapshot integration.
implants.perk: Snapshot Rifling: Weapon ADS speed increases when health is low.

implants.name: Survival Kit V3
implants.description: Advanced survival implant with crowd control response.
implants.perk: Crowd Control: Defeating enemies while wounded increases movement speed briefly.

implants.name: Survival Kit V4
implants.description: Elite survival implant with emergency revival enhancement.
implants.perk: Back in Action: Faster ability recharge after being revived from a downed state.

implants.name: Bionic Leg Upgrades V1
implants.description: Basic leg augmentation for improved running speed.

implants.name: Bionic Leg Upgrades V2
implants.description: Enhanced leg servos for improved sprint and jump performance.
implants.perk: Finish the Job: Finisher range and speed increased.

implants.name: Bionic Leg Upgrades V3
implants.description: Advanced leg augmentation with muscular enhancement.
implants.perk: Muscular Augments: Increased jump height and slide distance.

implants.name: Bionic Leg Upgrades V4
implants.description: Elite leg augmentation for maximum mobility performance.
implants.perk: Muscular Augments: Significantly increased jump height and slide distance.

implants.name: Distance Runner V2
implants.description: Endurance leg implant optimized for sustained movement.
implants.perk: Explosive Resistance: Reduced damage from explosive sources.

implants.name: Distance Runner V3
implants.description: Advanced endurance implant with balancing systems.
implants.perk: Balancing Act: Improved accuracy while airborne or sliding.

implants.name: Distance Runner V4
implants.description: Elite distance runner implant with law enforcement protocols.
implants.perk: The First Law: Sprinting briefly grants damage resistance.

implants.name: Graceful Landings V2
implants.description: Impact dampening leg implant for aerial combat styles.
implants.perk: Recycler: Finishers heal nearby allies a small amount.

implants.name: Graceful Landings V3
implants.description: Advanced dampening system with feline reflex integration.
implants.perk: Crouching Tiger: Reduced fall damage and faster crouch movement speed.

implants.name: Graceful Landings V4
implants.description: Elite impact system with frenzy response protocols.
implants.perk: Frenzy Matrix: Brief speed boost after landing from height.

implants.name: Solid Stance V1
implants.description: Defensive leg implant that improves stance stability.

implants.name: Solid Stance V2
implants.description: Enhanced stance system with explosive resistance.
implants.perk: Explosive Resistance: Reduced damage from explosive and area-of-effect attacks.

implants.name: Solid Stance V3
implants.description: Advanced stance implant with emergency second wind.
implants.perk: Second Wind: Brief damage resistance when shields break.

implants.name: Strike Kit V1
implants.description: Offensive leg implant that enhances kick and melee strikes.

implants.name: Strike Kit V2
implants.description: Enhanced strike implant with heat management.
implants.perk: Thermal Sinks: Melee kills reduce current heat buildup.

implants.name: Strike Kit V3
implants.description: Advanced strike system with finishing move enhancement.
implants.perk: Finishing the Job: Finishers refund a portion of melee ability energy.

implants.name: Protector V1
implants.description: Shield-class implant that reinforces your Runner's protective barrier.
implants.perk: Damage absorption increases shield recharge rate.

implants.name: Protector V2
implants.description: Advanced shield protector with enhanced damage conversion.
implants.perk: Absorbed damage is partially converted to ability energy.

implants.name: Reinforced Shields V1
implants.description: Hardened shield implant that resists shield-disruption effects.
implants.perk: Reduced duration of EMP and shield-disruption effects.

implants.name: Reinforced Shields V2
implants.description: Enhanced shield reinforcement with anti-hack protocols.
implants.perk: Increased resistance to hacking and electronic warfare.
